CATAPULT LP

The Pingu Pathway

Phase 1: The Great Hatching

Smart Contract Development: Pingu puts his thinking cap on and his flipper to work calling it "Pingu's Antarctic Codefest". Under the watchful eyes of Catamoto, Pingu bakes a robust yet fun smart contract marking the first chirp towards his enticing journey.

Launch on Catamoto: In a grand kick-off party (with virtual fish and all), Pingu launches his meme coin on the reputable Catamoto, causing a frenzy among crypto fans and making several emperor penguins back home mighty proud.

Phase 2: The Arctic Wave

Iceberg Growing: Pingu token holders will participate in a unique staking system dubbed Iceberg Growing. Like the silent growth of icebergs beneath the surface, holders will stake their Pingu tokens and watch their wealth multiply underneath, like a hidden powerhouse.

Fish Hunt: IAn exciting reward event where members can earn bonus Pingu tokens by completing crypto-penguin-esque quests. They may find themselves hunting for elusive crypto-fish or unearthing aged ice treasures, the thrill of the hunt matched only by the lure of extra Pingu tokens!

Pingu’s Fish Market: Linking the utility of Pingu tokens to the real world. Users can purchase exclusive Pingu merchandise, perhaps a Cozy Penguin Hoodie or a Pingu Collector’s Edition Comic, from Pingu’s Fish Market. All transactions are to be made with Pingu tokens, significantly driving up the token’s value and utility.

Phase 3: The Polar Launch

Ice Chest Airdrops: Pingu introduces a reward mechanism "Ice Chest Airdrops" where holders of a certain amount of Pingu tokens regularly receive mystery boxes. Every box could include a variety of treasures - from more Pingu tokens, exclusive NFTs created by Arctic artists, to early access to future Pingu ventures!

Polar adoptions: Holders will have a chance to adopt a digital penguin from Pingu's expanding family. Every adopted penguin brings with its own set of rewards, flapping cool discounts to priority access to some events in their journey – all paid in Pingu tokens, of course, enhancing real-world value.

Pingu’s Fish Market: Linking the utility of Pingu tokens to the real world. Users can purchase exclusive Pingu merchandise, perhaps a Cozy Penguin Hoodie or a Pingu Collector’s Edition Comic, from Pingu’s Fish Market. All transactions are to be made with Pingu tokens, significantly driving up the token’s value and utility.

SELECTED WORKS • 2024

From the nostalgia of a childhood cartoon to a billion-dollar memecoin.

Pingugraphy

Specifically designed tokenomics and an audited smart contract featuring: 

  • Burned liquidity 

  • Most tokens in circulation 

  • Deflationary 

  • Extremely low initial market cap

Pingu has entertained and delighted us since the '90s. Join us early: soon, everyone will understand what Pingu truly is.
